title: The Crew Debates the Next Move
description: On pages 9–11, the crew debates the next move as the crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them.
scene: The Crew Debates the Next Move. The crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: At this rate,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The individual

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There'll be a full- blown war with much bloodshed...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If I can't stop this,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then it's all over for the kingdom of Alabasta...! It'll be taken over by crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's not good enough to just return alive anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If I can't get back soon enough, then a million of my people will be killing each other for no good reason.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's a million people there!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's quite the burden.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What were you even looking at!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What do you mean what? The ship's still heading straight.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, but you need to be looking at the log's needle!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can still tell the direction just fine since we're heading for that big cloud over there...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Clounds can move and change shape, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Uhh, my head hurts...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's why I told you to go get some rest while I take care of things.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HOW CAN I WHEN YOU CAN'T EVEN TAKE CARE OF THE DIRECTIONS!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The atmosphere... changed...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The weather's been clear all day.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Just call everyone here, will you?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, all of you! We've got work to do, come out!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Take the helm and steer for south.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What, I don't feel like taking orders from you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just shut up and do it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Lower the sails so we can catch wind from Portside.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is it, Nami? The seas are calm and the weather looks clear to me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: wind.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I have a feeling... that there's going to be strong wind coming from ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Probably...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Patients are not allowed to be

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HHHooot! Hot! Hot! We really do need to land and take you to a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's just my normal temperature! Now stop wasting time and get the ropes!

summary: This part centers on the crew debates the next move, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
